name: resident_render_perf
title: Resident Render
desc: FUSED RESIDENT Gaussian-splat forward render: the whole splat.render_ondevice 11-stage pipeline (6 MVMUL+5 SFPU) collapsed to 6 fused super-stages, run in ONE doorbell ring per pixel-group with every intermediate staged through L1 (no host round-trip). Proven on silicon 51 dB, full tile + worker grid. Build w/ overrides ITERATIONS=32.

telemetry.note: elapsed cycles + event counts per zone; published to the L1 perf region at 0x169000. Decode pending — runner currently peeks the base word only.

note: bhtop resident canon (not a tt-llk import); see RESIDENT_GRID.md. SFPU ops square/exp/log/log1p compiled in; F5 is a KT=2 accumulating matmul (la@Stri+lpa@I).
